subject: A pair of scissors levitating amid swirling blue ethereal energy, animated by spectral wisps that resemble clutching hands or claws reaching out from luminous mist
description: A mundane pair of metal scissors floats in mid-air, suspended by surging blue magical energy. Around the scissors, ghostly tendrils and ethereal hands made of glowing mist curl outward and upward, as if a spirit has been bound into the inanimate object and is asserting itself. The blades are dark and worn-looking, contrasting with the bright cyan and white luminescence of the swirling aura. The lower portion of the frame hints at a wooden surface or shelf, but the focal action is the floating, ensouled tool surrounded by a vortex of pale blue spiritual force.
foreground: metal scissors suspended in air with ghostly hand-like tendrils of blue energy emerging around it
background: swirling blue mist and ethereal vapor with hints of a wooden surface below
